requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements for BESS Power Conversion System (PCS / Storage Inverter) — Elering Network Code
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统并网要求（储能变流器/PCS侧）——Elering电网规程
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統並網要求（儲能變流器／PCS側）——Elering電網規程

summary.en: BESS storage inverters (PCS) connecting to the Estonian grid must comply with EN 50549-1 (low voltage, ≤16 A/phase) or EN 50549-2 (medium voltage), which specify requirements for generating plants connected in parallel with the public distribution network, including voltage/frequency ride-through, reactive power capability, anti-islanding, and reconnection limits. Additionally, Elering (the Estonian Transmission System Operator, TSO) operates the national grid under the Elering Network Code (võrgueeskiri) and EU Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (Requirements for Generators, RfG). Estonia completed desynchronisation from the BRELL ring (linking Russia and Belarus) and synchronised to the Continental European synchronous area on 8 April 2025 — this is a critical historical event because it changed the frequency control environment and applicable grid stability requirements. Grid-connected BESS units must now operate to Continental European frequency dynamics (49.5–50.5 Hz normal band) rather than the BRELL ring's distinct operating profile. Elering requires grid-connection agreements and technical documentation for generators and storage above defined capacity thresholds. The nominal grid voltage is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz — differing from China's 220/380 V baseline.
summary.zh: 接入爱沙尼亚电网的储能变流器（PCS）须符合EN 50549-1（低压，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中压）标准，规定了并联接入公共配电网的发电装置的电压/频率穿越、无功功率能力、孤岛保护及重新并网要求。此外，爱沙尼亚输电系统运营商（TSO）Elering依据爱沙尼亚《电网规程》（võrgueeskiri）及欧盟法规（EU）2016/631（发电机要求，RfG）运营国家电网。爱沙尼亚于2025年4月8日完成与BRELL环网（连接俄罗斯和白俄罗斯）的脱同步，并与欧洲大陆同步区完成并网——这是一个关键历史事件，改变了频率控制环境及适用的电网稳定性要求。并网储能装置现须按欧洲大陆频率动态（正常频带49.5–50.5 Hz）运行，而非BRELL环网的特定运行状态。Elering要求超过规定容量阈值的发电和储能项目签订并网协议并提交技术文件。标称电网电压为单相230 V/三相400 V、50 Hz，与中国220/380 V基准不同。
summary.zht: 接入愛沙尼亞電網的儲能變流器（PCS）須符合EN 50549-1（低壓，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中壓）標準，規定了並聯接入公共配電網的發電裝置的電壓／頻率穿越、無功功率能力、孤島保護及重新並網要求。此外，愛沙尼亞輸電系統運營商（TSO）Elering依據愛沙尼亞《電網規程》（võrgueeskiri）及歐盟法規（EU）2016/631（發電機要求，RfG）運營國家電網。愛沙尼亞於2025年4月8日完成與BRELL環網（連接俄羅斯和白俄羅斯）的脫同步，並與歐洲大陸同步區完成並網——這是一個關鍵歷史事件，改變了頻率控制環境及適用的電網穩定性要求。並網儲能裝置現須按歐洲大陸頻率動態（正常頻帶49.5–50.5 Hz）運行，而非BRELL環網的特定運行狀態。Elering要求超過規定容量閾值的發電和儲能項目簽訂並網協議並提交技術文件。標稱電網電壓為單相230 V/三相400 V、50 Hz，與中國220/380 V基準不同。

standards_or_laws: Elering võrgueeskiri (Estonian Grid Code) — available at elering.ee
Estonian Electricity Market Act (Elektrituruseadus) — energy sector regulatory framework
ENTSO-E Continental European synchronous area requirements (post-April 2025 BRELL desynchronisation)

summary.en: In China, grid-connected storage inverters (PCS) are governed primarily by GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System), which superseded GB/T 34120-2017. The 2023 revision extended the AC output voltage upper limit to 35 kV, added fault ride-through (LVRT/HVRT) and primary frequency response requirements, and updated product classification. GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Power Station Connected to Power System) is sometimes referenced for inverter grid-connection behaviour. The National Energy Administration (NEA) and grid companies (State Grid / Southern Grid) also issue enterprise standards (Q/GDW series) for energy storage grid connection.
summary.zh: 中国并网储能变流器（PCS）主要依据GB/T 34120-2023《电化学储能系统储能变流器技术要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），规定了PCS的电气性能、并网保护、孤岛检测及通信接口要求。2023年修订版将交流输出电压上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次调频要求，并更新了产品分类。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定》有时也被参考用于逆变器并网行为。国家能源局及电网企业（国家电网/南方电网）还发布Q/GDW系列企业标准用于储能并网。
summary.zht: 中國並網儲能變流器（PCS）主要依據GB/T 34120-2023《電化學儲能系統儲能變流器技術要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），規定了PCS的電氣性能、並網保護、孤島檢測及通信接口要求。2023年修訂版將交流輸出電壓上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次調頻要求，並更新了產品分類。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定》有時亦被參考用於逆變器並網行為。國家能源局及電網企業（國家電網／南方電網）還發布Q/GDW系列企業標準用於儲能並網。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34120-2023 — Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System (SAMR/SAC; supersedes GB/T 34120-2017; recommended national standard)
Q/GDW 1564-2014 (State Grid enterprise standard — current supersession status not publicly confirmable; verify with State Grid or SAC for any post-2020 revision)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 34120 is not accepted as equivalent to EN 50549-1/-2 or the Elering Network Code for EU/Estonia market access. PCS units exported from China must be re-tested and re-certified to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 by a recognised test laboratory. The Elering Network Code (post-April 2025 Continental European synchronisation) sets specific frequency response and reactive power requirements aligned with ENTSO-E Continental European grid rules — Chinese type-test reports against GB/T 34120 are not substitutable. Key technical gaps include: different voltage/frequency ride-through profiles (230/400 V vs 220/380 V), Continental European Q(U) curves, post-BRELL frequency band behaviour, reconnection delay settings, and communication protocol requirements (IEC 61850 vs. Chinese Modbus/CAN conventions). Estonian-language or English-language documentation is expected by Elering.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 34120不被爱沙尼亚/欧盟市场认可为EN 50549-1/-2或Elering电网规程的等效标准。从中国出口的储能变流器须经认可检测实验室重新测试并取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2认证。Elering电网规程（2025年4月与欧洲大陆同步区并网后）对频率响应和无功功率设定了符合ENTSO-E大陆欧洲电网规则的具体要求——依据GB/T 34120出具的中国型式试验报告不可替代。主要技术差距包括：电压/频率穿越曲线不同（230/400 V与220/380 V）、欧洲大陆Q(U)曲线、脱离BRELL环网后的频带行为、重新并网延迟设置及通信协议要求不同（IEC 61850对比中国Modbus/CAN惯例）。Elering期望文件为爱沙尼亚语或英语。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 34120不被愛沙尼亞/歐盟市場認可為EN 50549-1/-2或Elering電網規程的等效標準。從中國出口的儲能變流器須經認可檢測實驗室重新測試並取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2認證。Elering電網規程（2025年4月與歐洲大陸同步區並網後）對頻率響應和無功功率設定了符合ENTSO-E大陸歐洲電網規則的具體要求——依據GB/T 34120出具的中國型式試驗報告不可替代。主要技術差距包括：電壓／頻率穿越曲線不同（230/400 V與220/380 V）、歐洲大陸Q(U)曲線、脫離BRELL環網後的頻帶行為、重新並網延遲設置及通訊協議要求不同（IEC 61850對比中國Modbus/CAN慣例）。Elering期望文件為愛沙尼亞語或英語。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 50549-1/-2 are harmonised standards supporting the Low Voltage Directive and relevant national grid codes; EU RfG 2016/631 is directly binding EU law; Elering Network Code is mandatory for grid connection approval in Estonia. Post-April 2025 Continental European synchronisation adds ENTSO-E operational requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid connection in China — GB/T 34120-2023 is a recommended national standard (推荐性国标) but compliance is effectively required by State Grid / Southern Grid connection rules.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PCS / storage inverters certified only to GB/T 34120 are NOT compliant for Estonian / EU grid connection. Full re-testing to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 and the Elering Network Code is required. Particular attention is needed to the post-April 2025 Continental European frequency dynamics following desynchronisation from the BRELL ring. Engage an accredited EU test laboratory early in the product development cycle and verify current Elering technical connection requirements directly.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T 34120认证的中国储能变流器不符合爱沙尼亚/欧盟并网要求。须完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2及Elering电网规程的完整重新测试。需特别关注2025年4月与BRELL环网脱同步后的欧洲大陆频率动态。建议在产品开发周期早期联系经认可的欧盟检测实验室，并直接核实当前Elering技术并网要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T 34120認證的中國儲能變流器不符合愛沙尼亞/歐盟並網要求。須完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2及Elering電網規程的完整重新測試。需特別關注2025年4月與BRELL環網脫同步後的歐洲大陸頻率動態。建議在產品開發週期早期聯繫經認可的歐盟檢測實驗室，並直接核實當前Elering技術並網要求。
